title: G.C Styling Head Doll for Kids Hairdressing Set with Toy Hairdryer Girls Make up Peelable Nail Polish Mirror, Girls Gifts Birthday Role Play Toys for Girl 4 5 6 Year Old
features: 【Kids Hairdressing Head Set】: This is a fashion doll hairdressing set specially designed for children. It includes doll head*1, hair dryer*1, curling iron*1, hairpin*2, clips*10, nail polish*2, nail file*1, finger separator*1,mirror*1, eye shadow*1, comb*1, lipstick*1, rubber bands*5, and rich toy accessories, bringing an immersive hairdressing and makeup experience.

【High-Quality Kids Toys】: The doll's head is made of high-quality materials, the wig is very realistic and beautiful; just insert two AA batteries to use the toy's dry hair. This cosmetics is suitable for children, does not irritate the skin, and can be washed off with soap or water. Children can not only make dolls with makeup, but also do makeup themselves.

【Hairdresser Role Play for Kids】: Children can use a toy hairdryer to blow the doll's hair, use hairdressing accessories to create various hairstyles for it, match it with crowns and other accessories, and use cosmetics to design facial makeup for the doll, and paint the doll's nails with nail polish, so that children can play to their heart's content without worrying about messing up their faces.

【Little Stylist Role Play Toys】: Children can develop their hands-on ability, aesthetic ability and creativity by making hairstyles and makeup for dolls, improve their imagination and social skills in role-playing, and improve their hand-eye coordination. Let children improve their beauty quotient while playing.

【Ideal Girl Gift】: The kids' play makeup & hair dressing heads set toy is an ideal gift for girls aged 3-6, suitable for birthdays, Children's Day, Christmas and other festivals, and can also be used as a prize to reward children, bringing joy and surprises to children. If you have any questions about the product, please feel free to contact us, we will solve it for you within 24 hours.
